Name: Insurance Scheme
Description: The insurance scheme the patient is using to settle payment for services, expects a uuid

Name: Payment Method
Description: The payment method used by the patient to settle payment, expects a uuid

Name: Patient Type
Description: If the patient will be paying or receives services for free, expects a uuid

Name: Is Referred In?
Description: Is Patient Referred In from another hospital.

Name: Referred To Hospital
Description: Patient referred to higher center for further care and treatment

Name: Assigned Doctor
Description: Patient assigned to specific doctor for consultation
